entity.label: Nethaneel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the “princes” appointed by Jehoshaphat to teach the law through the cities of Judah (2 Chr. 17:7).

nodes.label: Nethaneel
nodes.description: One of the “princes” appointed by Jehoshaphat to teach the law through the cities of Judah (2 Chr. 17:7).

verses.text: Also in the third year of his reign he sent to his princes, even to Benhail, and to Obadiah, and to Zechariah, and to Nethaneel, and to Michaiah, to teach in the cities of Judah.
